author: @_heyrico
text:
Product design cheatsheet, bookmark this:

- Font: SF Pro, regular and medium
- Font size: 12px, 13px (base size), 14px, 16px, 18px, and 24px (the biggest)
- Colors: subtle (B5B5B5), default (EEEEEE), strong (FFFFFF), bg-selected (212121), border (FFFFFF 4%)
- Icon: @nucleoicons with 1px width

included.text: very well crafted product design ✨ https://t.co/GAt8U4xkr6 https://t.co/aMaM3jB7F9
